profile.innate_zh: 音乐天赋、情感表达力强、完美主义
profile.learned_zh: 十余年钢琴训练形成的极致肌肉记忆和舞台经验
profile.learned_en: 15 years of piano built muscle memory and stage poise
profile.belief_zh: 音乐是不需要翻译的语言
profile.belief_en: Music is the language needing no translation
profile.goal_zh: 在全国钢琴比赛中获奖
profile.goal_en: Place in a national piano competition
profile.contradiction_zh: 台上自信 vs 台下极度敏感
profile.contradiction_en: Confident on stage vs. hypersensitive off it
profile.deep_zh: 对表演失误有过度的恐惧
profile.deep_en: Excessively fears a single wrong note
profile.rhythm_zh: 上午练技巧，下午练曲目，晚上听录音反思
profile.rhythm_en: Technique AM, repertoire PM, self-review at night
profile.long_desire_zh: 下个月比赛曲目练到炉火纯青
profile.short_goal_zh: 把肖邦叙事曲的技术难点攻克
profile.short_goal_en: Crack the technical passage in Chopin's Ballade
profile.constraint_zh: 琴房排队紧张；手指有些酸痛
profile.bias_zh: 倾向放大每一个微小的失误
profile.narrative_zh: 昨天那个地方又弹错了，不能原谅自己
profile.narrative_en: I hit that same wrong note again - unforgivable
